positive: A stylized, high-contrast illustration of a majestic mountain range silhouette against a vibrant sunset sky. The mountains should feature sharp, clean geometric peaks, rendered in deep indigo and charcoal tones. In the foreground, place a small, serene group of stylized flora (pine trees, abstract wildflowers) adding depth and scale. Incorporate subtle celestial elements like a crescent moon and swirling nebulae in complementary colors of burnt orange and lavender. The overall style should be clean vector art merged with detailed watercolor textures, suitable for a graphic t-shirt print. Central composition, strong symmetry, bold lines, highly detailed, concept art, perfect for textile printing, --ar 1:1
